bugs.desc: string == on hash is non-constant-time (timing attack); use hmac.compare_digest
empty/short password accepted; no length check
updating existing key does not refresh LRU recency order
eviction uses > capacity (off-by-one): stores capacity+1 items
off-by-one: page*per_page skips first page (1-indexed needs (page-1))
integer division drops remainder; last partial page lost (needs ceil)
float arithmetic for currency causes rounding errors; use Decimal/int cents
pct not bounded to [0,100] and negative price not rejected
division by zero when n==0 not handled
split without maxsplit=1 breaks values containing '='
no strip; empty input yields [''] instead of []
non-atomic check-then-set allows bursts over limit under concurrency
fields with commas/quotes/newlines not escaped -> corrupt CSV
CSV formula injection: leading =,+,-,@ not neutralized
naive datetime.now() compared to possibly tz-aware expiry -> wrong/raises
returns negative for reversed args; no abs/ordering guard
mutable default argument shared across calls
env var read as string, not cast to bool/int
